case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. THERESA DAOS

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-01-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15020013), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JAN-17-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAOS, THERESA
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 16028007) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DAOS, THERESA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-13-2015
DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAOS, THERESA $1,153.68 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,437.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 16028007)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 16028007) AS TO DEFENDANT DAOS, THERESA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-01-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
